title: Chapter 17 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics2=1}} {{TelevisionEpisode |image=[[File:CW_Chapter_17.png]] |title="Chapter 17" |series=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' |season=[[Clone Wars: Season Two|Two]] |episode=7 |production=117 |screener= |airdate=[[April 5]], [[2004]]{{SWArchive|url=hyperspace/about/news/news20040323.html|text=''Clone Wars'' Season 2 on Hyperspace}} |intl release= |runtime=4 minutes |director=[[Genndy Tartakovsky]] |writer= |production company= |guests= |timeline=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]{{FactFile2014|6|22 BBY 75-80|Dark Side Influence}} dates the [[Hunt for the Decimator]], the [[Dark Reaper crisis]], the [[First Battle of Kamino]], the [[battle of Ohma-D'un]], the [[battle of Pengalan IV]], ''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]'', and the events of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' up until the [[Battle of Hypori]] to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], in that order. |prev="[[Chapter 16 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 16]]" |next="[[Chapter 18 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 18]]" }} {{Quote|On Yavin 4, Anakin has tracked down his would-be assassin, Asajj Ventress. Now he must find her in the wild jungles of the green moon before the battle between these two highly skilled warriors can truly begin.|StarWars.com summary|{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/17.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Seventeen (small)}}}} "'''Chapter 17'''" is the seventeenth episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, the seventh episode in [[Clone Wars: Season Two|Season Two]], and the seventeenth episode in [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[April 5]], [[2004]]. ==Plot summary== The ''[[Azure Angel]]'' drops out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] guides the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] in to land on the jungle [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. As he heads off to investigate, Skywalker hears the sound of another ship. Back at the landing site, he sees the squad of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] sent by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] disembarking from their [[CR20 troop carrier/Legends|transport]]. As the clones fan out to search the jungle, they are taken out one-by-one by someone using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Skywalker realizes something is wrong and returns to the landing site to see the transport and his starfighter explode, destroying [[R4-P22]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] charred dome flies out of the flaming wreckage to land at the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan's]] feet. [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] calmly walks out of the flames and reveals herself as she stands on the wreckage of Skywalker's ship. {{Quote|I'm going to make you pay for what you've done.''"
"''Come, Padawan. Your fall will be my ascension to the Sith.|Anakin Skywalker and Asajj Ventress|audio=ImGoingToMakeYouPay.flac|{{CW|17}}}} ==Credits== {{Credits |cast= *[[Grey Griffin|Grey DeLisle]]—[[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] *[[Mat Lucas]]—[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[André Sogliuzzo]]—[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper]] |crew= }} ==Appearances==
